LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING, WHICH IS NOT CONTESTED. PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE LEE'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER (AS TO DEFENDANT LAMBERT YUK LAM LEE) IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF MAY ATTACH $282,642. DEFENDANT SALLY HUEY LEE'S WAGES ARE EXEMPTED. THE REQUESTED AMOUNT IS REDUCED BY THE AMOUNT OF ATTORNEYS FEES SOUGHT BECAUSE THEY ARE INADEQUATELY SUPPORTED ON THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF IS TO PROVIDE A JUDICIAL COUNCIL ORDER AND POST A $10,000 UNDERTAKING PER CCP 489.220. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2013 Set For Trial On Nov-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Application For Right To Attach Order; Notice
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John W.R. Wiley, Esq. of the Law Offices of John Wiley, Tel. 415.831.0500, for plaintiff and moving party;
Cindy Lee, Esq. of the Law Offices of Cindy Lee, Tel. 415.885.5800 ext.15, for defendant Sally Lee.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE LEE's Application For Right To Attach Order (as to defendant Sally Huey Lee) is granted. Plaintiff may attach $282,642. Defendant Sally Huey Lee's wages are exempted. The requested amount is reduced by the amount of attorneys fees sought because they are inadequately supported on this motion. Plaintiff is to provide a judicial council order and post a $10,000 undertaking per CCP 489.220. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Application For Right To Attach Order; Notice
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John W.R. Wiley, Esq. of the Law Offices of John Wiley, Tel. 415.831.0500, for plaintiff and moving party.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling, which is not contested. PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE LEE's Application For Right To Attach Order (as to defendant Lambert Yuk Lam Lee) is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff may attach $282,642. Defendant Sally Huey Lee's wages are exempted. The requested amount is reduced by the amount of attorneys fees sought because they are inadequately supported on this motion. Plaintiff is to provide a judicial council order and post a $10,000 undertaking per CCP 489.220. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
